body:
/attempt #9455
/claim #9455

## Implementation Plan

I've identified and fixed the root cause:

1. **`InstallDocker.php`**: Changed `${VERSION_CODENAME}` to `${UBUNTU_CODENAME:-$VERSION_CODENAME}` in the Docker apt sources.list entry. This matches the fix already present in `install.sh`.

2. **`CheckUpdates.php`**: Added a `sed` command to fix existing `/etc/apt/sources.list.d/docker.list` files that may contain `13` instead of `trixie`, applied before `apt-get update`.

PR submitted: https://github.com/coollabsio/coolify/pull/9469

**Root cause**: On Debian 13 (Trixie), `$VERSION_CODENAME` from `/etc/os-release` may be `13` (numeric) instead of `trixie`, causing invalid apt repository URLs.
